notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado grounds into a double play, pitcher Trevor Rogers to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Jose Fernandez out at 2nd. Nolan Arenado out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Barrosa plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Barrosa hit by pitch. Tim Tawa to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Catcher James McCann picks off Jeremiah Jackson at 3rd on throw to third baseman Nolan Arenado.
